title: Fill Missing Data
descriptionHtml:
DataFrame products
+-------------+--------+
| Column Name | Type   |
+-------------+--------+
| name        | object |
| quantity    | int    |
| price       | int    |
+-------------+--------+

Write a solution to fill in the missing value as 0 in the quantity column.

The result format is in the following example.

 

Example 1:
Input:+-----------------+----------+-------+
| name            | quantity | price |
+-----------------+----------+-------+
| Wristwatch      | None     | 135   |
| WirelessEarbuds | None     | 821   |
| GolfClubs       | 779      | 9319  |
| Printer         | 849      | 3051  |
+-----------------+----------+-------+
Output:
+-----------------+----------+-------+
| name            | quantity | price |
+-----------------+----------+-------+
| Wristwatch      | 0        | 135   |
| WirelessEarbuds | 0        | 821   |
| GolfClubs       | 779      | 9319  |
| Printer         | 849      | 3051  |
+-----------------+----------+-------+
Explanation: 
The quantity for Wristwatch and WirelessEarbuds are filled by 0.
solutionMarkdown:
<!-- solution:start -->

### Solution 1

<!-- tabs:start -->

#### Python3

```python
import pandas as pd


def fillMissingValues(products: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    products['quantity'] = products['quantity'].fillna(0)
    return products
```

<!-- tabs:end -->

<!-- solution:end -->

python.label: Python
python.code:
import pandas as pd


def fillMissingValues(products: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    products['quantity'] = products['quantity'].fillna(0)
    return products
